race.comment: Consistent sprinter TOWN CRIER (9) has been outstanding this prep despite some so-so barriers. Pushed forward last start and refused to lie down, beaten just half a length in a BM85 over this distance at Eagle Farm. Drops sharply in the weights for this step up to open company. Will race on the speed and give backers a tremendous sight. RESTONICA (5) led in the Listed Eye Liner over 1350m at Ipswich recently only to succumb late. Unbeaten at Doomben and a definite contender back away from stakes grade. CASPERNOVA (12) has been about the mark at all four runs this prep. Three wins from five runs here at this trip is the stat that jumps off the page. PEREILLE (1) was excellent in the Listed Healy last time and is a live chance despite the big weight.
